settings.title: Our Services
settings.description: From routine oil changes to complex engine rebuilds, our ASE-certified technicians handle it all.

settings.title: Oil Changes & Scheduled Maintenance
settings.description: Conventional, synthetic blend, and full synthetic oil changes. We follow your manufacturer's maintenance schedule and reset service indicators.

settings.title: Brake Repair & Replacement
settings.description: Pads, rotors, calipers, brake fluid flush, and ABS diagnostics. We measure and photograph wear levels so you can see exactly what needs attention.

settings.title: Engine & Transmission Diagnostics
settings.description: Check engine lights, misfires, rough idle, transmission slipping. Factory-level scan tools for domestic, European, and Asian vehicles.

settings.title: Heating & A/C Service
settings.description: A/C recharge, compressor replacement, heater core repair, and full climate system diagnostics. Critical in Arizona heat.

settings.title: Tires & Alignment
settings.description: New tire installation, rotation, balancing, and four-wheel alignment. We carry major brands and can match or beat online pricing.

settings.title: Electrical & Battery
settings.description: Alternator and starter replacement, parasitic draw testing, battery testing, and full electrical system diagnosis.

settings.title: Preventive Care Plans
settings.description: Stay ahead of repairs with scheduled maintenance. All packages include a digital multi-point inspection.

settings.title: Essential
settings.features:
+ Synthetic blend oil change
+ Tire rotation
+ Multi-point inspection
+ Fluid top-off
+ Battery test

settings.title: Complete
settings.features:
+ Full synthetic oil change
+ Tire rotation & balance
+ Multi-point inspection
+ Brake measurement
+ A/C performance check
+ Cabin air filter

settings.title: Fleet PM
settings.features:
+ All Complete services
+ Priority scheduling
+ Consolidated invoicing
+ DOT inspection prep
+ Dedicated fleet advisor
+ Emergency tow coordination

settings.question: How long does an oil change take?
settings.answer: A standard oil change takes 30–45 minutes. If you add a tire rotation or inspection, plan for about an hour.

settings.question: Do you work on European and Asian vehicles?
settings.answer: Yes. We have factory-level diagnostic equipment for BMW, Mercedes, Audi, VW, Toyota, Honda, Subaru, and most other makes. Our technicians are trained on both domestic and import vehicles.

settings.question: What does the digital inspection include?
settings.answer: We photograph and measure key components including brakes, tires, belts, fluid levels, suspension, and undercarriage. You receive a report with photos and condition ratings on your phone before we recommend any work.

settings.question: Do you offer a warranty?
settings.answer: Every repair comes with a 24-month, 24,000-mile warranty on parts and labor. If something we fixed fails within that window, we make it right at no cost.

settings.question: Can I wait while my car is being serviced?
settings.answer: Yes. Our waiting area has Wi-Fi, coffee, and comfortable seating. For longer jobs, we also offer local shuttle service.

settings.text: Bring it in. We'll diagnose it and give you a clear estimate before any work begins.
